Summary of the Query:
The query asks for the founding date of the oldest riverside tavern in Wapping.

Skills and Tools:
1. Historical Research: Understanding how to find and verify historical information.
2. Web Searching: Utilizing tools to gather information from the internet.

Explanation:
- Historical Research: Necessary to understand the context of Wapping's history and identify sources for historical information.
- Web Searching: Essential for finding specific details about the oldest riverside tavern in Wapping, such as its founding date. The Ground_Google_Search_Tool and Web_RAG_Search_Tool can be used to find relevant information.

Additional Considerations:
- Verify the information from multiple sources for accuracy.
- Be aware of the limitations of each tool, such as potential inaccuracies or missing context.
- The Wikipedia_RAG_Search_Tool can be used if there is a specific website to search, but since the query is general, broader web searches may be more appropriate.
</answer>

The oldest riverside tavern in Wapping is The Prospect of Whitby, with its origins dating back to around 1520.[1](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Prospect_of_Whitby), [2](https://www.greeneking.co.uk/pubs/greater-london/prospect-of-whitby), [3](https://www.visitlondon.com/things-to-do/place/2231602-prospect-of-whitby), [4](https://eastlondontimes.co.uk/local/the-prospect-of-whitby-wappings-historic-pub-named-londons-best/), [5](https://vertexaisearch.cloud.google.com/grounding-api-redirect/AUZIYQGOS38piDFrclmz95FtyqbY-ZnSMnHTkFD6-aUs5Rr3oLEmKQg8l5IeHuAS3k5C2Xa2YxfaIJNImNN-oIuHE57FDQ42K3IwU8ifQLNGB1zq76W5ygkrmKlY44RSs6EuE4setGcqBsWiT0687zqOzAyxzZCkSChfN7T2crbT6JsdzXzA3MSmEHUcv7OtDmU=), [6](https://www.historyhit.com/locations/the-prospect-of-whitby/), [7](https://secretldn.com/the-prospect-of-whitby-pub/), [8](https://londonist.com/pubs/pubs/pubs/prospect-of-whitby)

Initially known as The Pelican and later as the Devil's Tavern due to its notorious reputation, the pub was frequented by sailors, smugglers, and pirates.[1](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Prospect_of_Whitby), [4](https://eastlondontimes.co.uk/local/the-prospect-of-whitby-wappings-historic-pub-named-londons-best/),
